title: Decision authorising the filing of observations on applications for participation in the proceedings
text:
- […] that under rule 89(1) of the Rules, the Prosecutor and the Defence are entitled to reply to any application for participation within a time limit to be set by the Pre-Trial Chamber, and that in order to enable them to effectively exercise this right, the Registrar shall provide them with a copy of such application; (p. 3).

- [...] under regulation 77(4) of the Regulations of the Court, the tasks of the Office of Public Counsel for the Defence shall include representing and protecting the rights of the defence during the initial stages of the investigation. The Office of Public Counsel for the Defence must have the right to reply to applications for participation at this initial stage of the investigation; (p. 3). 

- […] therefore that the Office of Public Counsel for the Defence must have the right to reply to applications for participation at this initial stage of the investigation; (p. 3).
keywords: rule 89.1 RoPE ; participation of victims ; application for participation ; reply to application for participation ;  -ID006254
